projects/_manifest.summary: Replace this sentence with a one-line description of what your projects domain covers — typically what you're building, deciding, or operating. The classification step in /ingest reads ONLY this summary line.

research/_manifest.summary: Replace this sentence with a one-line description of what your research domain covers and what kind of question routes here. The classification step in /ingest reads ONLY this summary line.

example-source.summary: A placeholder source page showing the required frontmatter fields and the structure agents should follow when filing new sources. Delete this file once you've ingested your first real source.
